{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Union military
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The starships lifting off [[Fathom]] were not part of the [[Union military]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
